DP.574.0001:
The foe is physically
pounded with a long
tail or a foreleg,
etc.
DP.574.0002:
The foe is attacked
with a sharp chop.
It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0003:
The foe is slapped
repeatedly, back
and forth, two to
five times in a row.
DP.574.0004:
The foe is hit with
a flurry of punches
that strike two to
five times in a row.
DP.574.0005:
The foe is slugged
by a punch thrown
with muscle-packed
power.
DP.574.0006:
Numerous coins are
hurled at the foe to
inflict damage.
Money is earned
after battle.
DP.574.0007:
The foe is punched
with a fiery fist.
It may leave the
target with a burn.
DP.574.0008:
The foe is punched
with an icy fist.
It may leave the
target frozen.
DP.574.0009:
The foe is punched
with an electrified
fist. It may leave
the target with
paralysis.
DP.574.0010:
Hard, pointed, and
sharp claws rake the
foe to inflict damage.
DP.574.0011:
Huge, impressive
pincers grip and
squeeze the foe.
DP.574.0012:
A vicious, tearing
attack with pincers.
The foe will faint
instantly if this
attack hits.
DP.574.0013:
A two-turn attack.
Blades of wind hit the
foe on the second
turn. It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0014:
A frenetic dance to
uplift the fighting
spirit. It sharply
raises the user’s
Attack stat.
DP.574.0015:
The foe is cut with a
scythe or a claw.
It can also be used
to cut down thin
trees.
DP.574.0016:
A gust of wind is
whipped up by wings
and launched at the
foe to inflict damage.
DP.574.0017:
The foe is struck
with large, imposing
wings spread wide
to inflict damage.
DP.574.0018:
The foe is blown away,
to be replaced by
another Pokémon
in its party. In the
wild, the battle ends.
DP.574.0019:
The user soars, then
strikes on the second
turn. It can also be
used for flying to
any familiar town.
DP.574.0020:
A long body or
tentacles are used
to bind and squeeze
the foe for two to
five turns.
DP.574.0021:
The foe is slammed
with a long tail,
vines, etc., to inflict
damage.
DP.574.0022:
The foe is struck
with slender, whiplike
vines to inflict
damage.
DP.574.0023:
The foe is stomped
with a big foot.
It may also make the
target flinch.
DP.574.0024:
The foe is quickly
kicked twice in
succession using both
feet.
DP.574.0025:
The foe is attacked
by a kick launched
with muscle-packed
power.
DP.574.0026:
The user jumps up

with a kick. If the

DP.574.0027:
The user cuts a

kick.
DP.574.0028:
Sand is hurled in the

its accuracy.
DP.574.0029:
The user sticks its

straight forward.
It may make the

DP.574.0030:
The foe is jabbed
with a sharply
pointed horn to

DP.574.0031:
The foe is jabbed

DP.574.0032:
The foe is stabbed
with a horn rotating

The foe instantly

DP.574.0033:
A physical attack
in which the user
charges and slams
into the foe with
its whole body.
DP.574.0034:
The user drops onto
the foe with its full

It may leave the foe

DP.574.0035:
A long body or vines
are used to wrap and

DP.574.0036:
A reckless, full-body
charge attack for

DP.574.0037:
The user rampages
and attacks for two

It then becomes
confused, however.
DP.574.0038:
A reckless, life-
risking tackle.
It also damages the

DP.574.0039:
The user wags its tail
cutely, making the

the target.

The foe is stabbed

It may also poison

DP.574.0043:

DP.574.0045:

DP.574.0049:
The foe is hit with a

For several turns,
this move prevents

DP.574.0051:
The foe is attacked

acid. It may also

Sp. Def stat.
DP.574.0052:

DP.574.0053:

DP.574.0054:
The user cloaks its

DP.574.0055:
The foe is blasted

DP.574.0056:
The foe is blasted by

DP.574.0058:
The foe is struck

DP.574.0059:

DP.574.0060:
The foe is attacked

DP.574.0061:
A spray of bubbles is

DP.574.0062:
The foe is hit with a

DP.574.0063:
The foe is attacked

DP.574.0064:
The foe is jabbed
with a sharply

DP.574.0065:
A corkscrewing

The user grabs the

The foe is thrown

DP.574.0070:
The foe is slugged

at maximum power.

DP.574.0071:
A nutrient-draining
attack. The user’s

A nutrient-draining
attack. The user’s
HP is restored by
half the damage taken
by the target.
DP.574.0073:

A full-power attack

fires it at the foe.
It may also lower the
target’s Sp. Def.
DP.574.0413:
The user tucks in
its wings and charges
from a low altitude.
The user also takes
serious damage.
DP.574.0414:
The user makes the
ground under the foe
erupt with power.
It may also lower the
target’s Sp. Def.
DP.574.0415:
The user trades held
items with the foe
faster than the eye
can follow.
DP.574.0416:
The user charges at
the foe using every
bit of its power.
The user must rest
on the next turn.
DP.574.0417:
The user stimulates
its brain by thinking
bad thoughts.
It sharply raises the
user’s Sp. Atk.
DP.574.0418:
The user strikes
with a tough punch as
fast as a bullet.
This move always goes
first.
DP.574.0419:
An attack move that
inflicts double the
damage if the user
has been hurt by the
foe in the same turn.
DP.574.0420:
The user flash
freezes chunks of
ice and hurls them.
This move always goes
first.
DP.574.0421:
The user slashes with
a sharp claw made
from shadows.
It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0422:
The user bites with
electrified fangs.
It may also make the
foe flinch or become
paralyzed.
DP.574.0423:
The user bites with
cold-infused fangs.
It may also make the
foe flinch or freeze.
DP.574.0424:
The user bites with
flame-cloaked fangs.
It may also make the
foe flinch or sustain
a burn.
DP.574.0425:
The user extends its
shadow and attacks
the foe from behind.
This move always goes
first.
DP.574.0426:
The user launches a
hard-packed mud ball
to attack.
It may also lower the
target’s accuracy.
DP.574.0427:
The user tears at
the foe with blades
formed by psychic
power. It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0428:
The user focuses its
willpower to its head
and rams the foe.
It may also make the
target flinch.
DP.574.0429:
The user looses a
flash of energy from
its polished body.
It may also lower the
target’s accuracy.
DP.574.0430:
The user gathers all
its light energy and
releases it at once.
It may also lower the
foe’s Sp. Def stat.
DP.574.0431:
A charging attack
that may also leave
the foe confused.
It can also be used
to scale rocky walls.
DP.574.0432:
Obstacles are moved,
reducing the foe’s
evasion stat. It can
also be used to
clear deep fog, etc.
DP.574.0433:
The user creates a
bizarre area in which
slower Pokémon get
to move first for five
turns.
DP.574.0434:
Comets are summoned
down from the sky.
The attack’s recoil
sharply reduces the
user’s Sp. Atk stat.
DP.574.0435:
A flare of electricity
is loosed to strike
all Pokémon in battle.
It may also cause
paralysis.
DP.574.0436:
An inferno of scarlet
flames washes over
all Pokémon in battle.
It may also inflict
burns.
DP.574.0437:
A storm of sharp
leaves is whipped up.
The attack’s recoil
sharply reduces the
user’s Sp. Atk stat.
DP.574.0438:
The user violently
whirls its vines or
tentacles to harshly
lash the foe.
DP.574.0439:
The user launches a
huge boulder at the
foe to attack.
It must rest on the
next turn, however.
DP.574.0440:
A slashing attack
that may also leave
the target poisoned.
It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0441:
The user shoots
filthy garbage at the
foe to attack.
It may also poison
the target.
DP.574.0442:
The foe slams the
target with its
steel-hard head.
It may also make the
target flinch.
DP.574.0443:
The user launches a
steel bomb that
sticks to the target.
This attack will not
miss.
DP.574.0444:
The user stabs the
foe with a sharpened
stone. It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0445:
If it is the opposite
gender of the user,
the foe is charmed
into sharply lowering
its Sp. Atk stat.
DP.574.0446:
The user lays a trap
of levitating stones
around the foe. The
trap hurts foes that
switch into battle.
DP.574.0447:
The user snares the
foe with grass and
trips it. The heavier
the foe, the greater
the damage.
DP.574.0448:
The user attacks
using a sound wave
based on words it has
learned. It may also
confuse the foe.
DP.574.0449:
The user releases
countless shots of
light. Its type varies
with the kind of Plate
the user is holding.
DP.574.0450:
The user bites the
foe. If the foe is
holding a Berry, the
user eats it and
gains its effect.
DP.574.0451:
The user fires a
concentrated bundle
of electricity. It may
also raise the user’s
Sp. Atk stat.
DP.574.0452:
The user slams its
rugged body into the
foe to attack. The
user also sustains
serious damage.
DP.574.0453:
The user lunges at
the foe at a speed
that makes it almost
invisible. It is sure
to strike first.
DP.574.0454:
The user calls out
its underlings to
pummel the foe.
It has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0455:
The user calls out
its underlings to
make a living shield,
raising its Defense
and Sp. Def stats.
DP.574.0456:
The user calls out
its underlings to heal
it. The user regains
up to half of its
max HP.
DP.574.0457:
The user delivers a
life-endangering head
butt at full power.
The user also takes
terrible damage.
DP.574.0458:
The user slams the
foe with a tail, etc.
The target is hit
twice in a row.
DP.574.0459:
The user blasts the
foe with power that
distorts even time.
The user must rest
on the next turn.
DP.574.0460:
The user tears the
foe along with the
space around it.
This move has a high
critical-hit ratio.
DP.574.0461:
The user faints. In
return, the Pokémon
taking its place will
have its status and
HP fully restored.
DP.574.0462:
The foe is crushed
with great force.
The attack is more
powerful the more HP
the foe has left.
DP.574.0463:
The foe becomes
trapped within a
maelstrom of fire
that rages for two
to five turns.
DP.574.0464:
The foe is dragged
into a world of total
darkness that puts it
to sleep.
DP.574.0465:
The user generates
a shock wave from
within its body.
It may also lower the
target’s Sp. Def.
DP.574.0466:
The user creates a
gust of repulsive
wind. It may also
raise all the user’s
stats at once.
DP.574.0467:
The user disappears,
then strikes the foe
on the second turn.
It hits even if the
foe used Protect.
